title: S + V, V-ing...（分詞構句，主動）

formulas.zh: 現在分詞片語置於句首，後接主句；表示與主句動作同時發生或連續動作
主句後接現在分詞片語；表示連續的動作或附加說明

explanation: 現在分詞構句是將時間、原因、條件等副詞子句簡化而成，用V-ing形式開頭。關鍵原則：分詞的邏輯主詞必須與主句主詞相同。若邏輯主詞不同，則需保留主詞形成獨立分詞構句（Absolute phrase）。此句型避免重複主詞，使句子更簡潔有力。常見功能包括表時間（When/After）、原因（Because）、條件（If）等，是學測常考的進階語法。

examples.eng: Walking down the street, she noticed a beautiful old bookstore.
examples.chi: 走在街上時，她注意到一間美麗的老書店。

examples.eng: The students discussed the project, sharing their ideas and suggestions.
examples.chi: 學生們討論這個計畫，分享他們的想法和建議。

examples.eng: Seeing the heavy rain, they decided to postpone the outdoor event.
examples.chi: 看到大雨，他們決定延期戶外活動。

examples.eng: Having finished her homework, Mary watched her favorite TV show.
examples.chi: 完成功課後，瑪麗看她最喜歡的電視節目。

extension.tip: 判斷邏輯主詞是否與主句主詞一致是關鍵。若分詞片語的邏輯主詞與主句主詞不同，該分詞構句為錯誤，須改用含邏輯主詞的獨立分詞構句（如：The bus being late, we missed the meeting）或完整副詞子句。同時留意分詞時態：簡單式表同時/習慣，完成式表先行。

examples.test: ❌ Entering the classroom, the lights went off.
examples.result: → ✓ Entering the classroom, he saw the lights go off. / As he entered, the lights went off.（邏輯主詞應為人，不是燈）

examples.test: ✓ Winning the competition, Sarah felt extremely proud.
examples.result: → 邏輯主詞 Sarah 與主句主詞一致，表達贏得比賽後感到驕傲的同時狀態

examples.test: ✓ Having studied for hours, the students took the exam confidently.
examples.result: → 完成式分詞表示讀書發生在考試前，強調時序關係

extension.note: 記住口訣：『V-ing的邏輯主詞等於主句主詞，才能用現在分詞構句；邏輯主詞不同時用獨立分詞構句。』

parts: the exam, the student felt confident.
exercises.sentence: Having prepared for the exam, the student felt confident.
exercises.translation: 做好考試準備後，那名學生感到很有自信。

parts: a noise outside, the dog started barking.
exercises.sentence: Hearing a noise outside, the dog started barking.
exercises.translation: 聽到外面的聲音，狗開始吠叫。

parts: The children played in the park,
exercises.sentence: The children played in the park, laughing loudly and happily.
exercises.translation: 孩子們在公園裡玩，開心地大笑。

parts: a dark cloud approaching, we decided to go home immediately.
exercises.sentence: Seeing a dark cloud approaching, we decided to go home immediately.
exercises.translation: 看到烏雲接近，我們決定立即回家。

parts: her notes before the exam, Sarah felt more confident.
exercises.sentence: Reviewing her notes before the exam, Sarah felt more confident.
exercises.translation: 在考試前複習她的筆記，莎拉感到更有信心。

exercises.sentence: Knowing the deadline was approaching, they decided to work faster.
exercises.translation: 知道截止日期臨近，他們決定加快工作速度。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的分詞構句形式，表示兩個同時發生的動作
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the instructions carefully, Tom completed the task without any mistakes.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「Reading」。現在分詞 Reading 表示與主句 completed 同時發生的動作，邏輯主詞均為 Tom。B 項 Read 為原形動詞不符文法；C 項 Having read（完成式分詞）表先行動作，但題意為同時進行；D 項 To read 為不定詞，不符分詞構句用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 完成句子，表示一連串的連續動作
mc_exercises.question_eng: The runner crossed the finish line, _______ her arms in triumph and celebrating her victory.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「raising」。現在分詞 raising 與後面的 celebrating 並列，表示跨越終點線後的一連串連續動作，邏輯主詞均為 The runner。B 項 raises 改變了句子結構且時態不符；C 項 to raise 為不定詞用法錯誤；D 項 raised 為過去式，不符分詞構句結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的分詞形式，表示原因或背景說明
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ that the project deadline was approaching, the team decided to work overtime during the weekend.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A「Knowing」。現在分詞 Knowing 用於表示原因，相當於「Because they knew that...」，邏輯主詞為 the team。B 項 Having known 表先行完成動作，與後句邏輯關係不符；C 項 To know 為不定詞，表目的而非原因；D 項 Known 為過去分詞，表被動意義不符題意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 分析句子結構，選擇邏輯主詞正確的分詞構句
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the novel last night, _______ it was already midnight, Sarah still couldn't put it down and finished reading all 300 pages.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B「Having read / knowing」。第一空用 Having read（完成式分詞）表示先於主句的動作「她前晚讀過小說」；第二空用 knowing（現在分詞）與主句動詞並時，表示「儘管知道已是午夜」的狀況說明，邏輯主詞均為 Sarah。A 項第一空時態關係錯誤；C、D 項第二空都不符合邏輯關係。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的分詞構句形式，表示時間順序。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ his work, he left the office and went home.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (Finishing)。分詞構句用現在分詞表示與主句同時發生的動作。分詞邏輯主詞 (he) 與主句主詞相同，應使用簡單現在分詞。B 項 (Finished) 是過去分詞，不符合主動意義。C 項 (Having finished) 強調先後順序但不必要。D 項 (To finish) 是不定詞，無法作分詞構句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的分詞構句，表示原因關係。
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the heavy traffic, Sarah arrived at the meeting late.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (Being caught in)。分詞構句表原因時，若動詞是被動意義，應使用「being + 過去分詞」形式。Sarah 被困在車陣中（被動），所以用 being caught in。B 項 (Caught in) 省略 being，在標準文法中不正確。C 項 (To be caught in) 是不定詞。D 項 (Having been caught in) 強調完成，但無必要。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 小明走進教室，看到老師在黑板上寫數學題目。
translation_exercises.answer: Walking into the classroom, Xiaoming saw the teacher writing math problems on the blackboard. / Xiaoming walked into the classroom, seeing the teacher writing math problems on the blackboard.
key_points: Walking into / entering the classroom（進教室）
saw the teacher writing（看到老師在寫）
邏輯主詞一致（Xiaoming both walked and saw）
hints: 提示1：用現在分詞 V-ing 取代『走進...時』的時間副詞子句，表示同時發生的兩個動作
提示2：兩個動作的邏輯主詞必須相同（都是 Xiaoming），否則句義不清

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 她完成了家庭作業，便開始複習考試內容。
translation_exercises.answer: Having finished her homework, she began reviewing the exam material. / She finished her homework, then began reviewing the exam material by using the structure with having done.
key_points: Having finished（完成式分詞，表先行動作）
homework 與 exam material（功課與考試內容）
then / began reviewing（然後開始複習）
hints: 提示1：『完成了...之後』應使用完成式分詞 Having V-ed，表先發生的動作
提示2：現在分詞 V-ing 只表同時動作；完成式分詞 Having V-ed 表已完成後才進行下一步，要注意時序

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於時間不足，他匆匆收拾書包，趕上了最後一班公車。
translation_exercises.answer: Running out of time, he hurriedly packed his bag, catching the last bus. / Lacking sufficient time, he packed his bag hastily, catching the last bus.
key_points: Running out of time / Lacking time（時間不足，表原因）
packed his bag, catching（收拾書包，趕上）
V-ing 形式表原因或伴隨情況
hints: 提示1：『由於時間不足』可用『Running out of time, ...』表原因，比『Because he ran out of time』更簡潔
提示2：後半句『趕上公車』也用 V-ing（catching）表連續動作，保持邏輯主詞一致（都是 he）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師在課堂上解釋這道難題，班上的學生認真聆聽，並記下重點筆記。
translation_exercises.answer: Explaining the difficult problem in class, the teacher watched the students listening attentively and taking notes on key points. / The teacher explained the difficult problem in class, observing the students listening attentively and taking key notes.
key_points: Explaining the difficult problem in class（解釋難題）
listening attentively and taking notes（認真聆聽並記筆記）
邏輯主詞一致與伴隨情況的表達
hints: 提示1：主句主詞是『老師』，分詞構句『Explaining...』的邏輯主詞也必須是老師；後面『學生聆聽與記筆記』應作為老師『看到』的內容（賓語從句或分詞結構修飾），而非分詞構句
提示2：避免讓『學生聆聽』直接成為分詞構句，因為邏輯主詞與主句不符，應改為『the students listening and taking』作為老師『看到』的對象，或另起句子

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 聽到鈴聲響起，學生們急忙走進教室。
translation_exercises.answer: Hearing the bell ring, the students hurried into the classroom.
key_points: Hearing the bell ring（分詞構句開頭）
hints: 提示1：將『聽到鈴聲響起』簡化為『Hearing the bell ring』，作為時間副詞子句的替代
提示2：注意『聽』和『走進』的邏輯主詞都是『學生們』，所以可以使用分詞構句

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 因為擔心遲到，小王早早離開了家。
translation_exercises.answer: Worrying about being late, Xiaowang left home early.
key_points: Worrying about being late（分詞構句表原因）
hints: 提示1：將『因為擔心遲到』簡化為『Worrying about being late』，用V-ing形式表原因（代替Because子句）
提示2：『being late』是被動構造，但此處表示『遲到』的狀態，是分詞構句常見的用法
